html:
Exclusive to:

The Lunar Funcap is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted at the Celestial Orb or Celestial Altar with 4 Moon Shrooms and 1 Red Funcap.

The Lunar Funcap can be equipped in the head slot. When worn, it provide 20% Wetness resistance and 60 points of protection from Overheating. They also periodically spawn Lunar Spores, which will damage nearby mobs. You will also spawn a series of spores when you get hit. The spores you compare do not provoke creatures after the explosion. Wearing the Lunar Funcap grants immunity to the damage of the Spores. Like Garlands, they perish over time whether they are worn or not. They take 6 Days to completely spoil and can be worn for a total of 4 days.

Perishable items stored within the player's inventory while the Lunar Funcap is equipped will spoil 50% faster, this also applies to equipped items, including the Funcap itself. Items stored within Backpacks remain unaffected.

Trivia

  • The Lunar Funcap was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Lunar Funcap Equipped

Lunar Funcap
"It's like eating all kinds of mushrooms."
Object Info

"moon_mushroomhat"
“Makes the wearer look like a fun guy.”
–Wilson
“I don't like having my head messed with.”
–Willow
“Is mushy-room... for head!”
–Wolfgang
“If I'm lucky, it'll be poisonous.”
–Wendy
“WHIMSICAL ORGANIC CAMOUFLAGE”
–WX-78
“Ooo. What a delightfully wizened look.”
–Wickerbottom
“That there'll make you one with the forest.”
–Woodie
“It possesses a spritely magic.”
–Maxwell
“This helm runs flush with the förest's magic!”
–Wigfrid
“It's a cap cap!”
–Webber
“Wearing mushrooms is the next best thing to eating them.”
–Warly
“Haha! Friend hat!”
–Wormwood
“Really?”
–Winona
“I'll have mushroom spores in my horns for days.”
–Wortox
“Keeps head nice and clammy!”
–Wurt
“It's not made of the poisonous kind, right?”
–Walter
“I don't like the idea of a mushroom growing on my head.”
–Wanda
The Lunar Funcap is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted at the Celestial Orb or Celestial Altar with 4 Moon Shrooms and 1 Red Funcap.
The Lunar Funcap can be equipped in the head slot. When worn, it provide 20% Wetness resistance and 60 points of protection from Overheating. They also periodically spawn Lunar Spores, which will damage nearby mobs. You will also spawn a series of spores when you get hit. The spores you compare do not provoke creatures after the explosion. Wearing the Lunar Funcap grants immunity to the damage of the Spores. Like Garlands, they perish over time whether they are worn or not. They take 6 Days to completely spoil and can be worn for a total of 4 days.
Perishable items stored within the player's inventory while the Lunar Funcap is equipped will spoil 50% faster, this also applies to equipped items, including the Funcap itself. Items stored within Backpacks remain unaffected.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Lunar Funcap was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.
